description: Learn how to sauté vegetables to enhance their flavor and texture.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions, zucchini), oil, and seasoning.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add oil.
Add the vegetables to the pan and stir frequently.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cook until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.

safety_tips: Use a heat-resistant spatula to avoid burns.
Be cautious of hot oil when adding vegetables.
